name: mcp-power-user
description: Power-user playbook for driving any connected MCP server reliably — discovery, read-before-write, small mutations, verification, and error recovery.

interface.shortDescription: Discipline for driving any MCP server reliably.
interface.longDescription: A skills-only playbook that teaches the agent to drive any connected MCP server well: discover the tool surface, read before writing, mutate in small verified steps, and recover from errors. No connection of its own — it sharpens whatever MCP servers you already run.
defaultPrompt: Connect an MCP server, discover its tools, and make one safe verified change.
